title: Aerosol Optical Depth (MODIS Terra, Dark Target + Deep Blue)
notes: WMTS capabilities lists both 'MODIS_Terra_Aerosol' (short alias, tms=2km) and 'MODIS_Terra_Aerosol_Optical_Depth_3km' (canonical, same tms). Short alias tested and confirmed working. UI MUST label as 'Aerosol Proxy (AOD)' — NEVER PM2.5.
